title: Biomes Rebalanced
description: Aims to improve on the default biomes while keeping some of their original feel.
body:
[!["Minecraft Rebalanced" Collection by RainlessSky](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Rebalanced-2A2B2F?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=part%20of&labelColor=222329)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rWTOiG2z)
![Minecraft Rebalanced sees survival as a survival game, and less of a free sandbox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jPZFRfGa/images/7ebd705feba2a30b4017405ac475012e475fdcd5.png)
This datapack freshens up some biomes by adding more detail, such as better trees, more foliage variety, and more. Unlike many, biomes will retain similar block palettes (e.g. no basalt in a mountain).

![A screenshot of a Forest and a distant Old Growth Birch Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F4ip95dw/images/5ccb40d43a467e4333a73b88a6fd24208b5912de.png)
This is incomplete, and anything is subject to change.


### Current biomes changed
Almost any biome with Oak or Birch trees have the newer versions of the trees
- Birch Forest/Old Growth Birch Forest
- Oak Forest/Flower Forest
- Plains
- Desert/Badlands
- Jungles
- Swamp


<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

Known Issues
- Savanna biomes do not use updated Oak trees
- Desert fossils sometimes generate over water

</details>
